commands.review_summary:
The PR makes routine PR preparation reject changelog edits, removes the changelog helper from `scripts/pr`, stops merge-run from adding or verifying coauthor/reviewer/thanks trailers, and documents the policy in maintainer guidance.

PR surface: Tests -59, Docs +4, Other -480. Total -535 across 9 files.

Reproducibility: not applicable. this is a maintainer automation cleanup PR, not a runtime bug report. Source inspection of the PR head shows the changed prepare-gate and merge-run behavior, and live PR checks currently report no pending or failing required checks.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] The protected maintainer label and intentional attribution/changelog policy change require human maintainer review rather than closure or an automated repair lane.
